name: repair-receipt-workflow
description: Service/repair receipts with warranty flag, fault description, action notes, technician, and a 4-step status workflow (intake → in_progress → ready → picked_up).

endpoints: GET /api/repair-receipts — list (admin sees all, user sees own)

postInstall: 2. Push the schema: drizzle-kit push (or run db/migrations/repair-receipts.sql)
3. Customer fields are denormalised — pair with customer-register if you want a normalised customers table
4. Override generateReceiptNumber() if you need a different numbering format
5. The STATUS_TRANSITIONS map is enforced only if you call canTransition() in your PATCH handler — extend the route if you want strict validation
